name: Cupid Flameslinger
description: Love is in the air with the arrival of Cupid Flameslinger. Cupid Flameslinger was the Valentine's Day exclusive version of Flameslinger, only available on Skylanders: Lost Islands. In the months of February 2013 and 2014, he provides 25-percent more gold. He was able to be won in Willy's Wishing Well or could be purchased for 1500 Gems.
biography: Cupid Flameslinger was the Valentine's Day exclusive version of Flameslinger, only available on Skylanders: Lost Islands. In the months of February 2013 and 2014, he provides 25-percent more gold. He was able to be won in Willy's Wishing Well or could be purchased for 1500 Gems.
quote: Love is in the air with the arrival of Cupid Flameslinger.
personality: As a festive Valentine's Day version of Flameslinger, he brings a celebratory spirit to the Skylands, focused on sharing the love and increasing the gold collection of his allies.

story.content: Cupid Flameslinger was the Valentine's Day exclusive version of Flameslinger, only available on Skylanders: Lost Islands. In the months of February 2013 and 2014, he provides 25-percent more gold. He was able to be won in Willy's Wishing Well or could be purchased for 1500 Gems.

content: Love is in the air with the arrival of Cupid Flameslinger.

trivia: Cupid Flameslinger is the first Lost Islands-exclusive Skylander.
He is also the first festive Skylander.
He is the only Valentine's Day Skylander not to be of the Magic element.
gameplay: In the months of February 2013 and 2014, Cupid Flameslinger provides 25-percent more gold to the player in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was able to be won in Willy's Wishing Well or could be purchased for 1500 Gems.
